case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. PAULETTE JONES

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100135266)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-04-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
